segments.text: Neo is also showing counter picks
segments.original_text: ネオもカウンターという逆択を見せていく

segments.text: Like placing fair against airdodges and stuff
segments.original_text: 回避に対して空中前を置いとくなどっていうのは

segments.text: Is pretty easy for Greninja to execute
segments.original_text: 結構ゲッチ側がやりやすい

full_text: Neo is also showing counter picks Like placing fair against airdodges and stuff Is pretty easy for Greninja to execute Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah Whoa!

corrections.original: ネオもカウンターという逆作を見せていく
corrections.corrected: ネオもカウンターという逆択を見せていく
corrections.rule: Whisper kanji homophone: 逆作→逆択
